dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Tilak Varma b Thakur 39 (14b 1x4 5x6 25m) SR: 278.57

dismissalComment.html: caught on the fence, and Sooryavanshi's party is over! Shardul reaffirming those golden arm credentials. This is full outside off and Sooryavanshi absolutely laces it. The only problem, though, is that he hits it too flat and too near deep cover. Tilak leaps high to his left and completes the catch. Sooryavanshi is distraught as he walks off, but he has done his job, and given this crowd a show to remember!

image.longCaption: AM Ghazanfar, player portrait

dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel lbw b Ghazanfar 2 (3b 0x4 0x6 3m) SR: 66.66

dismissalComment.html: rapped on the back leg, and Jurel has to walk! Fizzed through on a back of a length on middle and leg. Skids on and Jurel is trapped on the crease. Seems to get pinged right in front and he seems happy to walk off initially but then he has a change of heart and reviews. If he has not hit this, it could be curtains. No bat involved. Ball Tracking returns three reds, and Jurel has to go, and he takes a review along with him too!

dismissalComment.html: holes out to long on this time, and Ghazanfar has another wicket! This is flatter and perhaps fuller outside off. Parag looks to repeat the dose and cloths it flat towards long on. Regulation chance for Tilak, and RR lose their skipper!

dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel lbw b Ghazanfar 2 (3b 0x4 0x6 3m) SR: 66.66

dismissalComment.html: rapped on the back leg, and Jurel has to walk! Fizzed through on a back of a length on middle and leg. Skids on and Jurel is trapped on the crease. Seems to get pinged right in front and he seems happy to walk off initially but then he has a change of heart and reviews. If he has not hit this, it could be curtains. No bat involved. Ball Tracking returns three reds, and Jurel has to go, and he takes a review along with him too!

dismissalText.commentary: Ryan Rickelton c †Jurel b Archer 8 (4b 0x4 1x6 5m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: straight up the chimney, and taken! Hard length just outside off. Rickelton has a swipe across the line but the ball moves away just enough to cause the miscue. Skews up a mile and Jurel does well to call everyone off. Settles under it in the short third region and makes no mistake. RR on the board early!

dismissalText.commentary: Rohit Sharma lbw b Sandeep Sharma 5 (6b 0x4 0x6 15m) SR: 83.33

dismissalComment.html: pinned on the boot, and that is plumb with a capital P! Rohit does not think so, though. Zipped into the blockhole on off. Rohit shapes for the scoop. Goes too far across and then cannot access the ball. If there is no bat involved, this could be a terrible review. No bat involved. Ball Tracking comes up and...it shows the ball to be thundering into the stumps. Rohit takes a review along with him, and this chase is in tatters!

dismissalComment.html: slapped straight to Jaiswal at long on, and Bishnoi is doing his thing again! Googly on a length on middle. Spins in a touch and that seems to cramp Hardik ever so slightly. He cannot free his arms fully and hits it flat to Jaiswal, who gobbles up the chance smartly to his left. MI reeling!

dismissalText.commentary: Sherfane Rutherford c Sandeep Sharma b Deshpande 25 (8b 2x4 2x6 14m) SR: 312.5

dismissalComment.html: has that carried?! That is an astonishing catch if it has! Slower ball on a back of a length outside off. Rutherford swishes hard at it and the ball flies off the outside edge towards short third. Sandeep lunges forward and seems to pick it up inches off the turf. Replays confirm it. Sensational grab, and Rutherford's rear-guard action has come to an end!
